title: metrosideros rubra
intro: Metrosideros rubra, also known as the New Zealand Christmas tree or red rātā, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the myrtle family, native to New Zealand and parts of Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Metrosideros rubra include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant is prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, and can also be used in topical applications, such as creams and oils.
